title: Prepare culture media
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare culture media demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Prepare culture media

pcs.text: Prepare mixture of media and solvent to ensure solution and even settling of heat soluble materials
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare mixture of media and solvent to ensure solution and even settling of heat soluble materials?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare mixture of media and solvent to ensure solution and even settling of heat soluble materials.

pcs.text: Label media to allow tracking in subsequent processes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Label media to allow tracking in subsequent processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Label media to allow tracking in subsequent processes.

pcs.text: Use a vessel large enough to endure adequate mixing and heating of the media

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use a vessel large enough to endure adequate mixing and heating of the media.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check pH of media where pH is critical?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check pH of media where pH is critical.

pcs.text: Dispense media into vessels for sterilisation, leaving room for expansion during heating and cooling

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispense media into vessels for sterilisation, leaving room for expansion during heating and cooling.
